query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_returns AS
SELECT 
  p.symbol,
  p.date,
  (p.close / LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY p.symbol ORDER BY p.date) - 1) AS return_pct
FROM prices p

  (p.close / LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY p.symbol ORDER BY p.date) - 1) AS return_pct
